tasks.title: Invert head tilt controls to fix left/right mapping
tasks.description: Negate the tiltAngle value in main.js before passing it to updatePhysics() to correct the inverted head tilt controls. The tracker.js already applies a negation that incorrectly inverts the mapping, but tracker.js is marked DO NOT MODIFY, so the fix goes in the consumer.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: When the user tilts their head to the left, the ball moves to the left. When the user tilts their head to the right, the ball moves to the right.
tasks.claudeMd:
# Project Context

You are fixing an inverted head tilt control in a Three.js ball-rolling game.

## Codebase

Pure static HTML+JS served by nginx. No npm, no build step. Three.js v0.183.2 via CDN importmap.

- `index.html` — Main page with Three.js importmap, overlay UI, and all CSS
- `js/main.js` — Game loop and state management
- `js/physics.js` — Ball physics, collision detection
- `js/renderer.js` — Three.js scene, mesh creation, level generation
- `js/tracker.js` — MediaPipe head tilt detection (**DO NOT MODIFY**)
- `Dockerfile` + `nginx.conf` — Docker build serving on port 8080

## Bug

Head tilt controls are inverted. Tilting left moves ball right, tilting right moves ball left.

## Root Cause

In `js/tracker.js:59`, there is a negation: `rawTilt = -Math.atan2(...)` that incorrectly inverts the tilt mapping. Since tracker.js must NOT be modified, the fix is applied in the consumer.

## Exact Fix

In `js/main.js`, line 280, change:
```js
const result = updatePhysics(dt, tiltAngle, pitch);
```
to:
```js
const result = updatePhysics(dt, -tiltAngle, pitch);
```

That's the entire fix. One character change.

## Conventions
- 2-space indent
- ES module imports/exports
- No unnecessary comments for obvious changes

## Build
- `docker build -t teeter .` must succeed
- No test suite exists

checklist.description: Negate tiltAngle in main.js updatePhysics call
steps: Find line 280: `const result = updatePhysics(dt, tiltAngle, pitch);`
Verify the edit is correct with Read tool

quality_checklist.description: Only the tiltAngle parameter is negated, no other changes made
steps: Run git diff to confirm only one line changed

checks.description: Head tilt left moves ball left, head tilt right moves ball right
steps: Start the app in a browser with camera access
Tilt head to the left — ball should move to the left
Tilt head to the right — ball should move to the right
